title: ceratocephalus acmella var. uliginosa
intro: Ceratocephalus acmella var. uliginosa, also known as bog acmella, is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratocephalus acmella var. uliginosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
